## Before requesting review

- [ ] Ran the project locally and exercised the change
- [ ] If I touched Razor / HTML classes or icons, I ran `npm run build:css` in `HurrahTv.Client/`
- [ ] I read every diff in VS Code's Source Control panel and can explain each change
- [ ] If this is a UI change, I tested at desktop AND mobile widths in Chrome DevTools
- [ ] No new Console errors in the browser
- [ ] Requested review from **GitHub Copilot** and addressed its findings
- [ ] Assigned **@mkerchenski** as reviewer

<!-- Reminder: do not self-merge. @mkerchenski reviews and squash-merges to main. -->
